Loren's Legion

Faction / Organisation · First seen 3302-10-26 · 4 mentions
Active: 3302-10-26 → 3303-03-16
Related Entities
L
Prism
L
Hiram's Anchorage
Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3303-03-16
Galactic News Loren's Legion Appeal Concludes
Ambassador Cuthrick Delaney announced that Loren's Legion's appeal for tantalum was enthusiastically received by the galactic community. Hundreds of independent pilots delivered tantalum to Hiram's Anchorage in the Prism system.
3303-03-09
Galactic News Loren's Legion Appeal Concludes
Ambassador Cuthrick Delaney announces that Loren's Legion's appeal for tantalum has concluded successfully. Hundreds of pilots delivered materials to Hiram's Anchorage.
3303-03-02
Community Goal Loren's Legion Issues Request
Loren's Legion places an open order for tantalum to satisfy a spike in client demand. The organisation's facility at Hiram's Anchorage is running at full capacity.
3302-10-26
Galactic News Loren Trial Begins
The trial of Lady Kahina Tijani Loren began at the Prism Hall of Justice under tight security. Loren was moved to a secure holding area after meeting Ambassador Cuthrick Delaney, while Admiral Denton Patreus arrived hours later for the closed-door trial.
